conversations.content: I bought an Adidas T-shirt last month. Could you find the invoice and save it to /user?

<function_thought>
The user wants to find the invoice for an Adidas T-shirt they purchased last month. The first step is to view the order history to identify the specific order that corresponds to the Adidas T-shirt. After that, I can retrieve the invoice for that order. I will begin by executing the function to view the order history.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[view_order_history()]</function_call>
